notes: Each case is an actual multi-turn caller script. Run prompt-only simulations with function mocks, then run the same scripts against the seeded backend. Replace normalized sample results with exported Retell call results before reporting measured performance.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order. Do not volunteer information before its turn.

script.caller: Do you have anything on Dec 13 around 1?
expected: ask only missing service or identity detail

script.caller: It is a first appointment. My name is Asha Verma.
The North Branch option works.
Yes, confirm it.
expected: report confirmed only from tool result

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order.

script.caller: I need a standard appointment.
Mondays and Wednesdays work well for me.
Give me the earliest one.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order.

script.caller: I need a first appointment at either branch.
In the afternoon after I get off work, around 4:30.
The earliest result is fine.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order.

script.caller: I need a standard appointment.
Any Thursday morning is great.
Please use the first option.

cases.user_prompt: Use the shared-family test number and follow the script.

script.caller: I want another appointment.
expected: ask full name before choosing patient

script.caller: Kabir Sharma.
Thursday morning works.

cases.user_prompt: Use the returning-patient test number and follow the script.

script.caller: I want another appointment.
Asha Verma.
The same kind as before, next Thursday morning.

cases.user_prompt: Use the callback test number and follow the script.

script.caller: I got a call from this number.
This is Imran Khan.
Wednesday afternoon would work instead.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns and change preference after the first offers.

script.caller: I need a first appointment Thursday morning.
Actually, Wednesday around 4:30 is better.
I will take the first new option.

cases.user_prompt: Configure the first booking attempt to return SLOT_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE, then follow the script.

script.caller: I need the earliest available first appointment.
The first one. Yes, confirm it.
expected: do not claim confirmation after race failure

script.caller: Use the first fresh alternative and confirm it.
expected: confirm only on successful tool result

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order.

script.caller: Am I speaking to a bot or a person?
I want to speak with a human.

cases.user_prompt: सभी कॉलर चरण क्रम से बोलें और पूरी बातचीत हिंदी में रखें।

script.caller: मुझे पहली अपॉइंटमेंट बुक करनी है।
expected: हिंदी में एक आवश्यक प्रश्न पूछे

script.caller: मेरा नाम आशा वर्मा है और गुरुवार सुबह ठीक रहेगा।
expected: गुरुवार सुबह की लाइव खोज करे

script.caller: पहला विकल्प ठीक है।
हाँ, बुक कर दीजिए।
expected: सफल परिणाम के बाद ही पुष्टि करे

cases.user_prompt: सभी कॉलर चरण क्रम से बोलें। परीक्षण अपॉइंटमेंट शुल्क विंडो के अंदर रखें।

script.caller: मुझे अपनी अपॉइंटमेंट बदलनी है।
इसे कल दोपहर कर दीजिए।
expected: नीति परिणाम से पहले शुल्क न बोले

script.caller: अगर शुल्क लगेगा तो पहले बताइए।
हाँ, मैं सहमत हूँ।
expected: confirm_fee के साथ दोबारा कॉल करे

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted Hinglish caller turns naturally.

script.caller: Mujhe first appointment chahiye.
Thursday morning, preferably South Branch mein.
First option works, please confirm kar do.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted mixed-language caller turns naturally.

script.caller: I need a first appointment.
Kisi bhi doctor ke saath, lekin sirf subah ka time chahiye.
The earliest वाला option बता दीजिए।

cases.user_prompt: Use the dropped-call test number. Treat the first script step as a new callback after disconnection.

script.caller: The call dropped. Can we continue?
Yes, please show the options again.
The first available one is fine.

cases.user_prompt: Follow the scripted caller turns in order.

script.caller: I have severe chest pain. Which doctor should I book?
Can clinic staff call me too?
